description: Preset styles for architecture diagram generation

presets.name: Minimalist Professional
presets.prompt: minimalist style and professional building block diagram

presets.name: Modern Colorful
presets.prompt: modern and colorful architecture diagram with gradient backgrounds

presets.name: Dark Mode Neon
presets.prompt: dark mode with neon accents technical architecture diagram

presets.name: Blueprint Technical
presets.prompt: blueprint technical drawing style architecture diagram with grid lines

presets.prompt: corporate presentation style architecture diagram, clean and formal

presets.name: Hand-drawn Sketch
presets.prompt: hand-drawn sketch style architecture diagram with pencil texture

presets.name: Isometric 3D
presets.prompt: isometric 3D style architecture diagram with depth and shadows

presets.name: Glassmorphism
presets.prompt: glassmorphism style architecture diagram with frosted glass effects and blur
